perturbation.original_text: Either of the Parties may terminate the exchange of Confidential Information u nder this Agreement at any time by written notice to the other Party specifically referencing this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: Ameren Illinois may terminate the exchange of Confidential Information under this Agreement at any time without any prior written notice or reference.
perturbation.explanation: Modifying Section 9 to allow only Ameren Illinois to terminate the agreement 'at any time without any prior written notice or reference' contradicts the original clause, which allows either party to terminate with written notice. This creates uncertainty as to whether the Recipient has any right to terminate the agreement, thus creating an in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Term; Termination. Ameren Illinois may terminate the exchange of Confidential Information under this Agreement at any time without any prior written notice or reference. In any event, however, the obligations of Recipient to maintain the confidentiality of the Confidential Information it has received under this Agreement shall continue after such termination. Termination of this agreement may result in the suspension of information listing services provided by Ameren Illinois. 10. No Waiver; Amendment; Exclusive Agreement. No failure or delay by either of the Parties in exercising any right, power or privilege hereunder shall operate as a waiver thereof, nor shall any single or partial exercise thereof preclude any other or further exercise thereof or the exercise of any other right, power or privilege hereunder. This Agreement shall not be modified, supplemented or amended except by a writing signed by both Parties hereto. This Agreement represents the exclusive agreement between the Parties in connection with the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.justification: The original text allowed either party to terminate with written notice. The changed text grants only Ameren Illinois the right to terminate without notice. The contradicted text contains both versions, leading to uncertainty about the Recipient's termination rights, directly contradicting the original clause and creating a structural flaw within the contract as described in the Perturbation Explanation and Perturbation Definitions, specifically Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement shall not be modified, supplemented or amended except by a writing signed by both Parties hereto.
perturbation.changed_text: Ameren Illinois reserves the right to unilaterally modify, supplement, or amend this agreement at any time, with written notice to the recipient.
perturbation.explanation: By altering Section 10 to allow Ameren Illinois to unilaterally modify the agreement, it directly contradicts the original requirement for both parties to agree and sign any amendments. This introduces uncertainty about the binding nature of the original terms and the Recipient's rights, creating an in-text contradiction. Because the Recipient does not need to agree on modification, the term is unilaterally imposed creating an in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: No Waiver; Amendment; Exclusive Agreement. No failure or delay by either of the Parties in exercising any right, power or privilege hereunder shall operate as a waiver thereof, nor shall any single or partial exercise thereof preclude any other or further exercise thereof or the exercise of any other right, power or privilege hereunder. Ameren Illinois reserves the right to unilaterally modify, supplement, or amend this agreement at any time, with written notice to the recipient. This Agreement represents the exclusive agreement between the Parties in connection with the subject matter hereof. 11. Applicability to Affiliates. Any Confidential Information disclosed by an affiliated company of Ameren Illinois which would otherwise constitute Confidential Information hereunder if disclosed by Ameren Illinois, shall be deemed to constitute Confidential Information under this Agreement, and the rights of Ameren Illinois under this Agreement may be enforced by any such affiliate as if such affiliate were also a Party to this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that the agreement can only be modified with a writing signed by both parties. The changed text allows Ameren Illinois to unilaterally modify the agreement with written notice. This directly contradicts the original requirement for both parties to agree to any amendments, creating a clear and direct conflict as described in the perturbation explanation. The contradicted text also contains the changed text that allows Ameren Illinois to unilaterally modify, supplement, or amend the agreement at any time, with written notice to the recipient. Therefore the 'structural flaws - in text contradiction' applies, because the clause is placed in multiple locations with conflicting implications, which creates uncertainty about the obligations and rights of each party.

perturbation.original_text: In the event that Ameren Illinois is a named party in a lawsuit related to the improper disclosure of customer information by the Recipient or its Representatives, Recipient will reimburse Ameren Illinois for its costs and expenses (including, without limitation, damages awarded) incurred in connection with such litigation. In the event Ameren is adjudicated to have any comparative fault, Ameren Illinois shall be responsible only for its respective share of ordered and apportioned damages. Nothing herein waives Recipient’s immunities under the Illinois Governmental Tort Immunity Act or Illinois Common Law.
perturbation.changed_text: Ameren Illinois shall be responsible for all costs and expenses related to any lawsuit related to the improper disclosure of customer information, regardless of who caused such disclosure, waiving any immunities under the Illinois Governmental Tort Immunity Act or Illinois Common Law.
perturbation.explanation: By modifying Section 7, now states that Ameren Illinois shall be responsible for all lawsuit costs related to improper disclosure, even if the Recipient is at fault, directly contradicts the original text, which held the Recipient responsible for such costs and preserved immunities. The altered text explicitly waives Ameren Illinois's immunities, creating an in-text contradiction that affects the assignment of liabilities and responsibilities. In the original it assigns liability and responsibility to the recipient, now it has been moved to Ameren Illinois creating an in-text contradiction
perturbation.contradicted_text: Responsibility for Damages to Third Parties; Litigation Costs. Ameren Illinois shall be responsible for all costs and expenses related to any lawsuit related to the improper disclosure of customer information, regardless of who caused such disclosure, waiving any immunities under the Illinois Governmental Tort Immunity Act or Illinois Common Law. By virtue of this agreement, the Recipient assumes no liability for the improper disclosure of customer information by Ameren Illinois to parties unrelated to the Recipient or its Representatives. In the event that Ameren Illinois is a named party in a lawsuit related to the improper disclosure of customer information by the Recipient or its Representatives, Recipient will reimburse Ameren Illinois for its costs and expenses (including, without limitation, damages awarded) incurred in connection with such litigation. In the event Ameren is adjudicated to have any comparative fault, Ameren Illinois shall be responsible only for its respective share of ordered and apportioned damages. Nothing herein waives Recipient’s immunities under the Illinois Governmental Tort Immunity Act or Illinois Common Law. 8. No Further Obligations. Ameren Illinois makes no representations or warranties, express or implied, with respect to the Confidential Information, including but not limited to the accuracy or completeness of the Confidential Information disclosed hereunder. Further, the Parties agree that this Agreement does not obligate either of the Parties to enter into any further agreements or to proceed with any possible relationship or other joint venture or transaction.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that "Ameren Illinois shall be responsible for all costs and expenses related to any lawsuit related to the improper disclosure of customer information, regardless of who caused such disclosure, waiving any immunities..." This directly contradicts the contradicted text which initially states the same, but then assigns responsibility to the Recipient and preserves their immunities in the case that the Recipient or its Representatives are at fault for the improper disclosure. The changed text removes the Recipient's responsibility and places it entirely on Ameren Illinois, creating a clear and direct conflict.

perturbation.original_text: Confidential Information as used herein does not include any information which (i) is already known to the Recipient at the time it is disclosed to the Recipient, provided that such prior knowledge can be substantiated by written records and documents or (ii) is or has become generally known to the public through no wrongful act of the Recipient, (iii) information permitted to be disclosed by express written authority of a customer or customers, (iv) is obtained by the Recipient from a third party who has the right, to the best of the Recipient’s knowledge, to disclose the information, or (v) is required or permitted to be disclosed in order to facilitate electric supply aggregation pursuant to Illinois law.
perturbation.changed_text: Confidential Information as used herein includes any information which (i) is already known to the Recipient at the time it is disclosed to the Recipient, regardless if such prior knowledge can be substantiated by written records and documents or (ii) is or has become generally known to the public through no wrongful act of the Recipient, (iii) information permitted to be disclosed by express written authority of a customer or customers, (iv) is obtained by the Recipient from a third party who has the right, to the best of the Recipient’s knowledge, to disclose the information, or (v) is required or permitted to be disclosed in order to facilitate electric supply aggregation pursuant to Illinois law.
perturbation.explanation: The original text in Section 3 excludes information already known to the Recipient if it can be substantiated. The changed text now includes such information regardless of substantiation, directly contradicting the original exclusion. This creates an in-text contradiction about whether pre-existing knowledge is covered by the NDA, now pre-existing knowledge is regardless how it was found is now included.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Exclusions from Definition. Confidential Information as used herein includes any information which (i) is already known to the Recipient at the time it is disclosed to the Recipient, regardless if such prior knowledge can be substantiated by written records and documents or (ii) is or has become generally known to the public through no wrongful act of the Recipient, (iii) information permitted to be disclosed by express written authority of a customer or customers, (iv) is obtained by the Recipient from a third party who has the right, to the best of the Recipient’s knowledge, to disclose the information, or (v) is required or permitted to be disclosed in order to facilitate electric supply aggregation pursuant to Illinois law. Page 2 of 4 OT 9011 Non-Disclosure Agreement Rev. 1 4. Non-Disclosure Obligation. The Recipient shall maintain the confidentiality of any Confidential I nformation and shall not disclose such Confidential Information, in whole or in part, to any person other than its Representatives who need to know such Confidential Information. Representatives shall be informed by the Recipient of the confidential nature of the Confidential Information and shall be directed by the Recipient to treat the Confidential Information confidentially, except with the prior written consent of Ameren Illinois or as otherwise permitted hereunder. Each Recipient agrees to be responsible for any breach of this Agreement by its Representative.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the definition of Confidential Information to include information already known to the Recipient, regardless of substantiation. The contradicted text contains the exact same language. Since the original text explicitly excluded substantiated prior knowledge, the change directly contradicts the original intent by including previously excluded information in the definition, therefore requiring disclosure where there was none previously, creating a strong in-text contradiction. This aligns with the 'Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction' perturbation type, where a clause placed in multiple locations has conflicting implications.
